<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>GOGO Cargo Express S.A.C. | Carga y Envíos - Sur del Perú</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo+Black&family=Work+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#14181f;
    --ink-soft:#1f2530;
    --red:#e2201f;
    --red-dark:#a3140f;
    --cream:#f3efe6;
    --paper:#fbf9f4;
    --steel:#6b7280;
    --amber:#f2b705;
    --white:#ffffff;
    --line: rgba(20,24,31,0.12);
  }
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    font-family:'Work Sans',sans-serif;
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--ink);
    line-height:1.5;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}
  .display{font-family:'Archivo Black',sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:-0.01em;}
  .mono{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;}
  .wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12.5px;
    letter-spacing:0.12em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--red);
    font-weight:600;
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{content:"";width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--red);display:inline-block;}

  /* ---------- HEADER ---------- */
  header{
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100;
    background:var(--ink);
    border-bottom:3px solid var(--red);
  }
  .nav-inner{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    padding:14px 28px;
    max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;
  }
  .logo{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    color:var(--white);
  }
  .logo-mark{
    width:38px;height:38px;
    background:var(--red);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    transform:skewX(-8deg);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .logo-mark span{
    display:inline-block; transform:skewX(8deg);
    color:var(--white); font-family:'Archivo Black',sans-serif; font-size:18px;
  }
  .logo-text{line-height:1.1;}
  .logo-text b{
    display:block; font-family:'Archivo Black',sans-serif; font-size:19px; letter-spacing:0.01em;
  }
  .logo-text small{
    display:block; font-size:9.5px; letter-spacing:0.14em; color:#a9afba; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
  }
  nav.links{display:flex;gap:34px;}
  nav.links a{
    color:#d7dae0; font-size:14.5px; font-weight:500; position:relative; padding:4px 0;
    transition:color .2s;
  }
  nav.links a:hover{color:var(--white);}
  nav.links a::after{
    content:""; position:absolute; left:0; bottom:-2px; width:0; height:2px; background:var(--red);
    transition:width .25s;
  }
  nav.links a:hover::after{width:100%;}
  .header-cta{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    color:var(--white); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:14px;
  }
  .header-cta .tag{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:#a9afba;display:block;}
  .header-cta .phone-btn{
    background:var(--red); color:var(--white); padding:9px 16px; font-weight:600;
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  }
  .burger{display:none;}

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    min-height:640px;
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    background:#0d1015 url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center 65%/cover no-repeat;
  }
  .hero::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(100deg, rgba(13,16,21,0.94) 20%, rgba(13,16,21,0.72) 48%, rgba(20,24,31,0.35) 78%);
  }
  .hero-inner{
    position:relative; z-index:2;
    width:100%;
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.15fr 0.85fr; gap:50px;
    align-items:center;
    padding:90px 28px 70px;
    max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(38px,5.4vw,64px);
    color:var(--white);
    line-height:1.02;
    margin:18px 0 22px;
  }
  .hero h1 em{font-style:normal;color:var(--red);}
  .hero p.sub{
    color:#cfd3da; font-size:17px; max-width:480px; margin-bottom:32px;
  }
  .hero-ctas{display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
    padding:14px 24px; font-weight:600; font-size:15px;
    border:2px solid transparent; cursor:pointer;
  }
  .btn-primary{background:var(--red); color:var(--white);}
  .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--red-dark);}
  .btn-outline{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color:var(--white);}
  .btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--white); background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);}

  /* quote card */
  .quote-card{
    background:var(--paper);
    padding:30px 28px 28px;
    border-top:5px solid var(--red);
    box-shadow:0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
  .quote-card h3{font-size:21px; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .quote-card .hint{color:var(--steel); font-size:13.5px; margin-bottom:20px;}
  .field{margin-bottom:14px;}
  .field label{
    display:block; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--steel); margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .field input, .field select{
    width:100%; padding:11px 12px; border:1.5px solid var(--line); background:var(--white);
    font-family:'Work Sans',sans-serif; font-size:14.5px; color:var(--ink);
  }
  .field input:focus, .field select:focus{outline:2px solid var(--red); border-color:var(--red);}
  .row2{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px;}
  .quote-submit{
    width:100%; background:var(--ink); color:var(--white); border:none; padding:14px;
    font-weight:600; font-size:15px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px;
    margin-top:4px;
  }
  .quote-submit:hover{background:var(--red);}

  /* ---------- FEATURE STRIP ---------- */
  .features{
    background:var(--white);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .features-grid{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;
  }
  .feature{
    padding:34px 28px; display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start;
    border-right:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .feature:last-child{border-right:none;}
  .feature .icon{
    width:44px;height:44px;flex-shrink:0;
    background:var(--ink); color:var(--red);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  }
  .feature h4{font-size:15.5px; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .feature p{font-size:13.5px; color:var(--steel);}

  /* ---------- SECTION GENERIC ---------- */
  section{padding:88px 0;}
  .section-head{max-width:640px; margin-bottom:50px;}
  .section-head h2{font-size:clamp(28px,3.4vw,40px); margin-top:14px; line-height:1.08;}
  .section-head p{color:var(--steel); margin-top:16px; font-size:16px;}

  /* ---------- SERVICIOS ---------- */
  .servicios-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:24px;}
  .servicio-card{
    background:var(--ink); color:var(--white); padding:38px 32px;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden; min-height:280px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-end;
  }
  .servicio-card.alt{background:var(--red);}
  .servicio-num{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:0.1em;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-bottom:auto;
  }
  .servicio-card h3{font-size:26px; margin-bottom:10px;}
  .servicio-card p{font-size:14.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.78); max-width:360px;}
  .servicio-card::after{
    content:"→"; position:absolute; right:28px; bottom:28px; font-size:26px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  }

  /* ---------- RUTAS / WAYBILL ---------- */
  .waybill-section{background:var(--ink); padding:80px 0;}
  .waybill-section .section-head h2, .waybill-section .section-head p{color:var(--white);}
  .waybill-section .section-head p{color:#aeb4bf;}
  .waybill{
    position:relative;
    background:var(--paper);
    padding:36px 10px;
    overflow-x:auto;
  }
  .waybill::before, .waybill::after{
    content:""; position:absolute; left:0; right:0; height:14px; background:
      radial-gradient(circle, var(--ink) 6px, transparent 6.5px) repeat-x;
    background-size:26px 14px; background-position:10px center;
  }
  .waybill::before{top:-7px;}
  .waybill::after{bottom:-7px;}
  .route-track{
    display:flex; align-items:center; min-width:max-content; padding:0 30px; gap:0;
  }
  .stop{
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:10px; width:128px; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .stop .num{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; color:var(--red); font-weight:600;}
  .stop .dot{width:13px;height:13px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--ink); border:3px solid var(--red);}
  .stop .city{font-family:'Archivo Black',sans-serif; font-size:14px; text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase;}
  .connector{
    flex:1; min-width:36px; height:2px;
    background-image:linear-gradient(to right, var(--steel) 0 6px, transparent 6px 12px);
    background-size:12px 2px; margin-bottom:32px;
  }

  /* ---------- NOSOTROS ---------- */
  .nosotros{display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.85fr 1.15fr; gap:56px; align-items:center;}
  .nosotros-img{position:relative;}
  .nosotros-img img{width:100%; height:460px; object-fit:cover;}
  .nosotros-img .tag{
    position:absolute; bottom:-18px; left:-18px; background:var(--red); color:var(--white);
    padding:14px 20px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:0.08em;
  }
  .nosotros-text p{color:var(--steel); font-size:16px; margin-bottom:18px;}
  .facts{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:1px; background:var(--line); margin-top:28px; border:1px solid var(--line);}
  .fact{background:var(--paper); padding:18px 20px;}
  .fact .k{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:var(--red); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px;}
  .fact .v{font-size:14.5px; font-weight:600;}

  /* ---------- CONTACTO ---------- */
  .contacto{background:var(--ink); color:var(--white);}
  .contacto .section-head h2, .contacto .section-head p{color:var(--white);}
  .contacto .section-head p{color:#aeb4bf;}
  .contact-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:60px;}
  .contact-list{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:26px;}
  .contact-item{display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start;}
  .contact-item .icon{
    width:42px;height:42px;flex-shrink:0; background:var(--red); color:var(--white);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  }
  .contact-item .label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:#8b91a0; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:5px;}
  .contact-item .val{font-size:16.5px; font-weight:600;}
  .contact-item a.val:hover{color:var(--red);}
  .cta-panel{
    background:var(--paper); color:var(--ink); padding:34px 30px; align-self:start;
    border-top:5px solid var(--red);
  }
  .cta-panel h3{font-size:22px; margin-bottom:10px;}
  .cta-panel p{color:var(--steel); font-size:14.5px; margin-bottom:22px;}
  .cta-panel .btn{width:100%; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:12px;}

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{background:#0d1015; color:#8b91a0; padding:34px 0;}
  .footer-inner{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:16px;}
  .footer-inner .flogo{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; color:var(--white); font-family:'Archivo Black',sans-serif; font-size:16px;}
  .footer-inner small{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.7;}

  /* whatsapp floating */
  .wa-float{
    position:fixed; bottom:24px; right:24px; z-index:200;
    width:58px;height:58px; background:#25D366; border-radius:50%;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .wa-float svg{width:28px;height:28px;fill:#fff;}

  @media(max-width:900px){
    nav.links{display:none;}
    .hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .hero{min-height:auto;}
    .features-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .feature{border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
    .servicios-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .nosotros{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .nosotros-img img{height:320px;}
    .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .header-cta .tag{display:none;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#inicio" class="logo">
      <div class="logo-mark"><span>G</span></div>
      <div class="logo-text">
        <b>GOGO</b>
        <small>CARGO EXPRESS S.A.C.</small>
      </div>
    </a>
    <nav class="links">
      <a href="#inicio">Inicio</a>
      <a href="#servicios">Servicios</a>
      <a href="#rutas">Rutas</a>
      <a href="#nosotros">Nosotros</a>
      <a href="#contacto">Contacto</a>
    </nav>
    <div class="header-cta">
      <span class="tag">Central</span>
      <a href="tel:+51928978041" class="phone-btn">928 978 041</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="hero" id="inicio">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="eyebrow" style="color:#ff6b5e">Servicios de carga y envíos · Sur del Perú</div>
      <h1 class="display">Tu carga,<br><em>nuestro compromiso</em></h1>
      <p class="sub">Transportamos tus encomiendas y mercaderías de forma rápida, segura y confiable a todo el sur del Perú.</p>
      <div class="hero-ctas">
        <a href="tel:+51928978041" class="btn btn-primary">📞 Llamar ahora</a>
        <a href="https://wa.me/51928978041?text=Hola%20Gogo%20Cargo%20Express,%20quisiera%20cotizar%20un%20env%C3%ADo" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline">Escribir por WhatsApp</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="quote-card">
      <h3 class="display" style="font-size:20px;">Solicita tu cotización</h3>
      <p class="hint">Completa los datos y te respondemos por WhatsApp.</p>
      <form id="quoteForm">
        <div class="field">
          <label>Nombre</label>
          <input type="text" id="qName" placeholder="Tu nombre" required>
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label>Origen</label>
            <select id="qFrom">
              <option>Tacna</option><option>Moquegua</option><option>Ilo</option><option>Arequipa</option>
              <option>Puno</option><option>Juliaca</option><option>Pucara</option><option>Cusco</option>
              <option>Ayaviri</option><option>Sicuani</option><option>Urcos</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Destino</label>
            <select id="qTo">
              <option>Cusco</option><option>Moquegua</option><option>Ilo</option><option>Arequipa</option>
              <option>Puno</option><option>Juliaca</option><option>Pucara</option><option>Tacna</option>
              <option>Ayaviri</option><option>Sicuani</option><option>Urcos</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>WhatsApp / Teléfono</label>
          <input type="tel" id="qPhone" placeholder="9XX XXX XXX" required>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="quote-submit">Cotizar por WhatsApp →</button>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="features">
  <div class="features-grid wrap" style="padding-left:0;padding-right:0;">
    <div class="feature">
      <div class="icon">🚚</div>
      <div><h4>Envíos diarios</h4><p>Salidas frecuentes a todas nuestras rutas.</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature">
      <div class="icon">📍</div>
      <div><h4>Amplia cobertura</h4><p>Presencia en todo el sur del Perú.</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature">
      <div class="icon">📦</div>
      <div><h4>Carga segura</h4><p>Manejo responsable en cada envío.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="servicios">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Qué hacemos</div>
      <h2 class="display">Nuestros servicios</h2>
      <p>Dos formas de mover lo que te importa, con el mismo cuidado y puntualidad de siempre.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="servicios-grid">
      <div class="servicio-card">
        <div class="servicio-num">01 / CARGA</div>
        <h3 class="display">Carga y mercadería</h3>
        <p>Transporte de carga pesada y voluminosa por carretera, con salidas frecuentes y manejo responsable en cada etapa del trayecto.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="servicio-card alt">
        <div class="servicio-num">02 / ENCOMIENDAS</div>
        <h3 class="display">Encomiendas</h3>
        <p>Envío de paquetes y encomiendas personales con seguimiento cercano y entrega puntual en toda nuestra red de rutas.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="waybill-section" id="rutas">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Nuestras rutas</div>
      <h2 class="display">Cobertura en el sur del Perú</h2>
      <p>Una sola ruta troncal, once paradas. Así conectamos tu carga de punta a punta.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="waybill">
      <div class="route-track" id="routeTrack"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="nosotros">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="nosotros">
      <div class="nosotros-img">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
" alt="Unidad de transporte Gogo Cargo Express">
        <div class="tag mono">FLOTA GOGO — TACNA</div>
      </div>
      <div class="nosotros-text">
        <div class="eyebrow">Quiénes somos</div>
        <h2 class="display" style="font-size:32px;margin:14px 0 20px;">Una empresa tacneña, hecha para la ruta del sur</h2>
        <p>Gogo Cargo Express S.A.C. es una empresa de transporte de carga por carretera, almacenamiento y depósito con sede en Tacna. Nacimos para conectar Tacna con Moquegua, Arequipa, Puno y Cusco a través de una red de rutas fijas y salidas frecuentes.</p>
        <p>Cada envío se maneja con el mismo criterio: seguridad en la carga, puntualidad en la entrega y un trato cercano con cada cliente, de encomienda en encomienda.</p>
        <div class="facts">
          <div class="fact"><div class="k">Sede</div><div class="v">Tacna, Perú</div></div>
          <div class="fact"><div class="k">Rubro</div><div class="v">Carga, almacenamiento y depósito</div></div>
          <div class="fact"><div class="k">Cobertura</div><div class="v">11 ciudades del sur</div></div>
          <div class="fact"><div class="k">Tipo</div><div class="v">Sociedad Anónima Cerrada</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contacto" id="contacto">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Contacto</div>
      <h2 class="display">Coordinemos tu envío</h2>
      <p>Escríbenos o llámanos, estamos para ayudarte con tu próxima carga.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="contact-list">
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="icon">📞</div>
          <div>
            <div class="label">Teléfonos</div>
            <a class="val" href="tel:+51928978041">928 978 041</a> · <a class="val" href="tel:+51052637149">052 637 149</a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="icon">✉️</div>
          <div>
            <div class="label">Correo</div>
            <a class="val" href="mailto:gogo.cargo.express@gmail.com">gogo.cargo.express@gmail.com</a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="icon">📍</div>
          <div>
            <div class="label">Dirección</div>
            <div class="val">Av. Arias Araguez N° 635 — Tacna, Perú</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cta-panel">
        <h3 class="display" style="font-size:20px;">Escríbenos directo</h3>
        <p>Respuesta rápida por WhatsApp en horario de atención.</p>
        <a href="https://wa.me/51928978041" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">Abrir WhatsApp</a>
        <a href="mailto:gogo.cargo.express@gmail.com" class="btn btn-outline" style="border-color:var(--line); color:var(--ink); background:var(--white);">Enviar correo</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap footer-inner">
    <div class="flogo">
      <div class="logo-mark"><span>G</span></div>
      GOGO CARGO EXPRESS
    </div>
    <small>
      GOGO CARGO EXPRESS S.A.C. · Av. Coronel Julián Arias Aragón N° 635, Tacna, Perú<br>
      © 2026 Gogo Cargo Express S.A.C. — Tu carga, nuestro compromiso.
    </small>
  </div>
</footer>

<a class="wa-float" href="https://wa.me/51928978041" target="_blank" aria-label="WhatsApp">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12c0 1.85.5 3.58 1.36 5.07L2 22l5.06-1.33A9.94 9.94 0 0012 22c5.52 0 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm0 18c-1.6 0-3.09-.44-4.36-1.2l-.31-.19-3 .79.8-2.93-.2-.31A7.93 7.93 0 014 12c0-4.41 3.59-8 8-8s8 3.59 8 8-3.59 8-8 8zm4.4-5.6c-.24-.12-1.43-.7-1.65-.78-.22-.08-.38-.12-.54.12-.16.24-.62.78-.76.94-.14.16-.28.18-.52.06-.24-.12-1.01-.37-1.92-1.18-.71-.63-1.19-1.41-1.33-1.65-.14-.24-.01-.37.11-.49.11-.11.24-.28.36-.42.12-.14.16-.24.24-.4.08-.16.04-.3-.02-.42-.06-.12-.54-1.3-.74-1.78-.19-.46-.39-.4-.54-.4-.14 0-.3-.02-.46-.02s-.42.06-.64.3c-.22.24-.84.82-.84 2s.86 2.32.98 2.48c.12.16 1.7 2.6 4.12 3.64.58.25 1.03.4 1.38.51.58.18 1.11.16 1.53.1.47-.07 1.43-.58 1.63-1.14.2-.56.2-1.04.14-1.14-.06-.1-.22-.16-.46-.28z"/></svg>
</a>

<script>
  const rutas = ["Tacna","Moquegua","Ilo","Arequipa","Puno","Juliaca","Pucara","Cusco","Ayaviri","Sicuani","Urcos"];
  const track = document.getElementById('routeTrack');
  rutas.forEach((city, i) => {
    const stop = document.createElement('div');
    stop.className = 'stop';
    stop.innerHTML = `<div class="num">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</div><div class="dot"></div><div class="city">${city}</div>`;
    track.appendChild(stop);
    if(i < rutas.length - 1){
      const c = document.createElement('div');
      c.className = 'connector';
      track.appendChild(c);
    }
  });

  document.getElementById('quoteForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    const name = document.getElementById('qName').value;
    const from = document.getElementById('qFrom').value;
    const to = document.getElementById('qTo').value;
    const phone = document.getElementById('qPhone').value;
    const msg = `Hola Gogo Cargo Express, soy ${name}. Quisiera cotizar un envío de ${from} a ${to}. Mi contacto: ${phone}`;
    window.open(`https://wa.me/51928978041?text=${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`, '_blank');
  });
</script>
<script defer data-relevanceai-share-id="bcbe5a/33cc1392-1fc9-4f6a-9274-e6c68af7f1f8/09203669-10c5-4166-99c7-d7529f850c7b" src="https://app.relevanceai.com/embed/chat-bubble.js" data-share-styles="hide_tool_steps=false&hide_file_uploads=false&hide_conversation_list=false&bubble_style=agent&primary_color=%23685FFF&bubble_icon=pd%2Fchat&input_placeholder_text=Type+your+message...&hide_logo=false&hide_description=false" ></script>
</body>
</html>
